redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: packages/ui had no Vitest setup; Button/Badge/Chip/ProgressBar/HealthBar tests and import-boundary suite did not exist.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: 22 packages/ui tests passed covering variants, Vietnamese copy, loading/disabled, aria-selected tabs, 44px remove targets, real/estimated segments, health segments, and import boundaries.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.refactorEvidence: Extracted loadUiStyles test helper; excluded __tests__ from ui tsconfig; extended theme tokens instead of hardcoded colors.

commands.outputSummary: 6 failed before CSS loader and import-boundary path fixes

redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: apps/demo lacked proof that new @juli/ui core exports are consumable from the demo app boundary.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: apps/demo ui-core-elements import-boundary test passed alongside existing home/navigation tests (5 total).
redGreenRefactorEvidence.refactorEvidence: Kept demo test as import-only proof without composing screens, per issue scope.

redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: ui type-check failed because __tests__ were included in tsc without jest-dom/node types.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: pnpm --filter @juli/ui type-check and pnpm --filter @juli/demo type-check both passed after excluding __tests__ from ui tsconfig.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.refactorEvidence: Preserved strict source compilation while keeping Vitest matchers in test-only files.

commands.outputSummary: jest-dom and node type errors in __tests__

implementationSummary: Implemented typed packages/ui core elements (Button, Badge, ConfidenceBadge, StatusChip, FilterChip, InputChip, ProgressBar, RealEstimatedProgressBar, HealthBar) with theme-token CSS, Vietnamese labels, 44px touch targets, focus-visible rings, and reduced-motion handling. Added Vitest interaction-state coverage and import-boundary proof for apps/demo consumption while preserving #397 DestinationCard/PrimaryNavigation exports.
assumptions: ConfidenceBadge maps high/medium/low to success/warning/destructive badge variants per design intent.
HealthBar risk tinting applies to filled segments when value is below atRiskThreshold (default 40).
Demo import-boundary test remains import-only; screen compositions are deferred to later issues.
risks: pnpm-lock.yaml updated for new @juli/ui devDependencies; root check:demo does not yet run @juli/ui tests — Review/Validate may want that wired in CI.
Small visual fidelity vs dashboard globals.css may differ until composition issues consume these primitives in screens.
